sections.paragraph:
ἑπταπλασίως adv. (s. prec. entry; LXX; the adj. Pla., Ep. 7, 332a; Eutocius [Archimed., Op. Omn. ed. JHeiberg III 1915] p. 244, 24) sevenfold Hs 6, 4, 2.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

prec. prec. = preceding

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

adj. adj. = adjective

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle
  2. ed. = edited (by), edition

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 388
